idea-plugin.name: Bruiser Progress Bar
idea-plugin.description: This is the Bruiser Progress Bar for IJ based IDEs based on the Nyan Progress Bar by Dmitry Batkovitch. It display Red and Pikachu for the basic bar and the bike animation for the indeterminate one.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0 Creation of the Bruiser Progress Bar Project
1.1 Adding bigger icon for larger screen
1.2 Fix images in description
1.3 Fix icon rendering issues
1.4 Usage of new Jetbrains API.
1.5 Fix project language level
1.6 Usage of JBUIScale instead of JBUI
1.7 Support IntelliJ 2023.3 and later
